# This file was generated by muscomp. DO NOT EDIT.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)

qt_add_qml_module(harbour_control_qml_viewmodels
    URI "com.MuscoviteHarbor.harbour_control.viewmodels"
    VERSION 1.0
    QML_FILES
        SafetyZoneDialog.qml
        HazmatPermitDialog.qml
        InvoiceLineDialog.qml
    SOURCES
        viewmodels/safety_zone_viewmodel.cpp
        viewmodels/safety_zone_viewmodel.hpp
        viewmodels/hazmat_permit_viewmodel.cpp
        viewmodels/hazmat_permit_viewmodel.hpp
        viewmodels/invoice_line_viewmodel.cpp
        viewmodels/invoice_line_viewmodel.hpp
)

target_link_libraries(harbour_control_qml_viewmodels PUBLIC
    Qt6::Core
    Qt6::Qml
    Qt6::Quick
)

# Aggregate type registration target (Qt 6.11+)
if(NOT TARGET all_qmltyperegistrations)
    add_custom_target(all_qmltyperegistrations)
endif()
if(TARGET harbour_control_qml_viewmodelsplugin)
    add_dependencies(all_qmltyperegistrations harbour_control_qml_viewmodelsplugin)
endif()

# QML Language Server configuration for IDE support
if(COMMAND qt_add_qmlls_ini)
    qt_add_qmlls_ini(harbour_control_qml_viewmodels)
endif()

# qmllint build gate (Qt 6.11+)
find_program(QMLLINT_EXECUTABLE qmllint HINTS ${Qt6_DIR}/../../../bin)
if(QMLLINT_EXECUTABLE)
    set(_qml_files)
    list(APPEND _qml_files ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SafetyZoneDialog.qml)
    list(APPEND _qml_files ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/HazmatPermitDialog.qml)
    list(APPEND _qml_files ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/InvoiceLineDialog.qml)
    add_custom_target(harbour_control_qmllint
        COMMAND ${QMLLINT_EXECUTABLE} ${_qml_files}
        WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
        COMMENT "Running qmllint on harbour_control QML files"
    )
endif()
